fields.title: Online
fields.label: Online (ATC)
fields.description: Items needed only when flying on a network (VATSIM, IVAO)

fields.title: NoActionNeed
fields.label: Informational Items
fields.description: Show items that require no physical action (verify / check only)

fields.title: Optional
fields.label: Optional Items
fields.description: Also show optional items; if off only required items are shown

fields.title: Long Runway
fields.description: RWY is long enough icw weight, not above 10000ft, so take-of without APU

fields.title: Anti-Ice Normal
fields.label: Anti-Ice (≤0°C)
fields.description: Temperature at or below 0°C — icing procedures apply
fields.prompt_message: OAT below 0 °C — Anti-Ice Normal procedures active?

fields.title: Short Runway
fields.label: Short Runway / High Altitude
fields.description: Short runway procedure or departure above 10 000 ft

fields.title: ZeroToTen
fields.label: 0°C – 10°C Conditions
fields.description: Temperature between 0°C and 10°C — additional checks required

fields.title: No Pushback
fields.label: No Pushback
fields.description: No pushback required — engine start at stand

fields.title: VA
fields.label: Virtual Airline
fields.description: You are flying a flight for your VA

fields.title: CenterTanks
fields.label: Center Tanks Loaded
fields.description: Center fuel tanks contain usable fuel. Activates Center Fuel Pump items.

fields.title: DualPilot
fields.description: Active when dual-pilot (PF/PM) mode is enabled. Items tagged with this attribute are hidden in solo mode.

fields.title: NotOnline
fields.description: Active when NOT flying online (no ATC network). Items tagged with this attribute are hidden when Online is selected.

fields.title: KeepScreenOn
fields.label: Keep Screen On
fields.description: Prevent the device screen from sleeping during a procedure
